posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Good morning. Greetings.
I am writing because of a doubt. I have a restricted column for the view, which has a numeric data, my question is: can I use the data of that column to intervene in a calculation within the column type formulas?
